productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's White Green Casual Shoe
description: The simple design of these numero uno shoes come with edgy attitude. The sturdy yet comfortable design takes you through the day in style. These look good when teamed up with jeans and tees for casual outings.The shoes come with soft fabric covers for easy storage.Upper Synthetic upper with perforations over the toe box and sides for extra breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit Padded collar and tongue for extra comfort Padded mesh collar and heel counter for breathability and comfort Logo branding on the tongue and behind collar Midsole Cushioned insole for light weight feel and all day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with interwoven diagonal line pattern for multi directioanl grip shoe careRub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
